typecheck.summary: TypeScript completed without errors after adding schedule poll eligible voter counts and match title placeholder guidance.

lint.summary: ESLint passed for the updated schedule UI, repository mapping, migration, and tests.

targetedTests.summary: Focused tests passed: 72 tests passed, covering 0/1 poll attendance display and Round N title placeholder.

localSupabaseApi.summary: Local Supabase reset, QA auth seed, demo seed, and real API tests passed: 15 tests passed, including poll eligibleVoterCount and schedule_poll_option comments.

productionSupabase.summary: Production migration succeeded and migration list includes align_comments_target_schema, adding target_type/target_id based comments compatibility for schedule poll option comments.

browserRuntime.command: Reloaded http://localhost:3000/ against the existing local Next dev server
browserRuntime.summary: First screen rendered with FC moim and 팀 둘러보기 text, and browser console error logs were empty.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed on rerun: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 223 tests passed, 15 skipped. An earlier unrelated locker-room validation test failed once and passed on targeted rerun.

issuesObserved: Schedule poll option attendance used a hardcoded minimum denominator of 2 instead of approved club member count.
Production comments table still used the legacy match_id shape, while current code queries target_type and target_id.
Match creation title placeholder did not show the Round N default that the server creates for blank match titles.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness promotion proposed; the issue was fixed with targeted UI/API tests, local Supabase verification, and a tracked production schema migration.
retrospective.reason: The issue was a product/schema stabilization change, not a reusable harness rule.
